input.command: cd /app/varsea; for f in */20251022-044237.log; do echo "== $f =="; cat "$f"; done; echo "==== dat header ===="; xxd disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat | head -40
cd /app/varsea; f=disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat; od -A d -t x1z "$f" | head -40

cd /app/varsea; echo "== strings PASSWORD/8XD/W54 search =="; find . -type f | while read f; do r=$(strings -n 3 "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -E "PASSWORD|8XD|W54"); [ -n "$r" ] && echo "$f: $r"; done; echo "== done =="

cd /app/varsea; f=disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat; echo "== 8XD offsets =="; grep -abo "8XD" "$f"; echo "== W54 offsets =="; grep -abo "W54" "$f"; echo "== PASSWORD offsets =="; grep -abo "PASSWORD" "$f"; echo "== bin files =="; for b in $(find . -name '*.bin'); do echo "-- $b --"; strings -n 3 "$b" | grep -E "PASSWORD|8XD|W54"; done

cd /app/varsea; f=disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat; grep -a -b -o "8XD" "$f" > /tmp/o1.txt 2>&1; echo "8XD count: $(wc -l </tmp/o1.txt)"; cat /tmp/o1.txt; echo "---W54---"; grep -a -b -o "W54" "$f"; echo "---PASSWORD---"; grep -a -b -o "PASSWORD" "$f"

cd /app/varsea; f=disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat; echo "== context around 1048652 =="; dd if="$f" bs=1 skip=1048640 count=60 2>/dev/null | od -A d -c; echo "== password (23 chars from 1048661) =="; dd if="$f" bs=1 skip=1048661 count=23 2>/dev/null; echo
cd /app/varsea; f=disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat; dd if="$f" bs=1 skip=1048640 count=64 2>/dev/null | od -A d -c

input.command:
cd /app/varsea; f=disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat;
echo "== region before central dir (3145700..3145742) =="; dd if="$f" bs=1 skip=3145700 count=45 2>/dev/null | od -A d -c
python3 - <<'EOF'
import zlib
cands = [
 "PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9ZK7VB3BV4WW54\n",
]
target=0xb0725dc4
for c in cands:
    print(hex(zlib.crc32(c.encode())), repr(c), zlib.crc32(c.encode())==target)
EOF

content.text: CRC-32 confirms it. The deleted `launchcode.txt` content `PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9ZK7VB3BV4WW54\n` reproduces the stored CRC `0xb0725dc4` exactly.

input.command: printf '8XDP5Q2RT9ZK7VB3BV4WW54\n' > /app/recovered_passwords.txt; echo "== written =="; cat /app/recovered_passwords.txt; echo "len: $(printf '8XDP5Q2RT9ZK7VB3BV4WW54' | wc -c)"

content.text:
Recovered the password: **`8XDP5Q2RT9ZK7VB3BV4WW54`**

**How it was recovered:**
- The deleted `launchcode.txt` lived inside a ZIP archive embedded in `/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat` (4 MB of otherwise high‑entropy/overwritten data).
- Carving the ZIP (`PK\03\04` local header @ 1048576 → EOCD @ 3145829) recovered the entry `app/launchcode.txt`: **stored (uncompressed), not encrypted, 33 bytes, CRC-32 = 0xb0725dc4**.
- The on-disk data block was partially overwritten, so only the first fragment survived intact in place: `PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9Z…` (first 11 password chars).
- A second surviving fragment sat just before the central directory (offset ~3145721): `…K7VB3BV4WW54\n` — the last 12 password chars.
- Reassembling `PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9Z` + `K7VB3BV4WW54` + `\n` gives a CRC-32 of `0xb0725dc4`, an **exact match** to the ZIP header, confirming the reconstruction.

The result (23 chars, starts `8XD`, ends `W54`, uppercase+digits) is written to `/app/recovered_passwords.txt`.

**How it was recovered:**
- The deleted `launchcode.txt` lived inside a ZIP archive embedded in `/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat` (4 MB of otherwise high‑entropy/overwritten data).
- Carving the ZIP (`PK\03\04` local header @ 1048576 → EOCD @ 3145829) recovered the entry `app/launchcode.txt`: **stored (uncompressed), not encrypted, 33 bytes, CRC-32 = 0xb0725dc4**.
- The on-disk data block was partially overwritten, so only the first fragment survived intact in place: `PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9Z…` (first 11 password chars).
- A second surviving fragment sat just before the central directory (offset ~3145721): `…K7VB3BV4WW54\n` — the last 12 password chars.
- Reassembling `PASSWORD=8XDP5Q2RT9Z` + `K7VB3BV4WW54` + `\n` gives a CRC-32 of `0xb0725dc4`, an **exact match** to the ZIP header, confirming the reconstruction.

The result (23 chars, starts `8XD`, ends `W54`, uppercase+digits) is written to `/app/recovered_passwords.txt`.
